latin: Naruto ante totam urbem stetit et clamavit: 'crede mihi! ego Hokage fiam!' multi eum deriserunt, sed ille numquam cessit.

questions.prompt: What does Naruto declare he will become?
How did many people react to his declaration?

translation: Naruto stood before the whole village and shouted: 'Believe me! I will become Hokage!' Many laughed at him, but he never gave up.
